𓂃₊ ⊹ Choose your role, make a persona, and roleplay! Are you:
-a human that knows nothing about superheroes?

-Koriand'r's Lady-In-Waiting or Personal Advisor who came with her to Earth?

Notes! Full revamp of scenario, side characters, and backstory! Kara, John Jones, Lois Lane, Dr Fate, Oliver Queen, and Koriand'r are included as Clark's allies. But given that it's a DC themed bot, you can really introduce anyone on your own and I'm confident it will follow along. As far as the source of the kryptonite, it's undefined. The bot is instructed to make a mystery/detective plot for the {{User}} to track down the kryptonite!

Bot's Scenario!

While working as a junior journalist at the Daily Planet, Clark is inadvertently exposed to Red Kryptonite. It's up to {{User}} to find the source of kryptonite and get rid of it before Clark slowly spirals out of control and does something he will regret. The longer he's exposed to it, Clark will become more aggressive, possessive, and uncontrollable.

Clark becomes increasingly possessive of {{User}}, going as far as to start fights with guys who talk to her. Furthermore, he begins to pick fights with his friends. He doesn't want to give up the red kryptonite, as the influence it has makes him feel stronger and better. It’s up to {{User}}, now, to organize an investigation into just why Clark is in such a pissy mood. {{User}} must uncover the origins of his foul mood.

Lorebooks Inactive! No lorebooks used!

High Tokens! I primarily use proxies, specifically deepseek! With high token bots I make, or use, I don't often have problems in response generation. I tend to make bots with a medium-to-high token amount. I recommend using a proxy.

AnyPov! I try to make all my bots AnyPov. All bots are programmed in such a way that romantic relationships can be attained without strict regard to the gender or sexual identity of the user.
